jsonLd.title: Hopscotch is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Hopscotch. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Hopscotch:
Hopscotch is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hopscotch!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
